raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section asserts two competing contribution frames — the multi-agent protocol DialogueDev and the single-agent RSP technique — and the coherence of the stated contribution claim is a live question under almost any interpretation of 'review'.","R1.2":"A structural logical tension runs through the excerpt: the paper is built around a multi-agent architecture yet concludes that a stripped-down single-agent prompt with RSP recovers most of the gains; the cross-section coherence of this argument needs explicit examination.","R1.3":"The section asserts precise quantitative claims (78.4% vs 71.2% pass@1; 34/80 vs 21/80 GitHub issue resolution) that cannot be verified against tables or figures within the excerpt; checking evidence-claim alignment is materially demanded.","R1.4":"RSP — 'generate, critique, and revise an explicit list of subgoals' — overlaps substantially with the self-refinement, scratchpad, and chain-of-thought decomposition literature; the novelty delta relative to nearest prior work requires assessment.","R1.5":"The narrative arc is structurally unusual: DialogueDev is foregrounded in the opening and evaluation setup, yet RSP is declared the central contribution only late in the section; whether this ordering undermines or serves the paper's argument is a reviewable structural question."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is the intended review primarily a technical content review — evaluating the validity of claims, internal logic, evidence support, and novelty — or primarily a writing and presentation review focused on improving prose clarity, flow, and sentence quality?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section asserts two competing contribution frames — the multi-agent protocol DialogueDev and the single-agent RSP technique — and the coherence of the stated contribution claim is a live question under almost any interpretation of 'review'.
rationale.R1.2: A structural logical tension runs through the excerpt: the paper is built around a multi-agent architecture yet concludes that a stripped-down single-agent prompt with RSP recovers most of the gains; the cross-section coherence of this argument needs explicit examination.
rationale.R1.3: The section asserts precise quantitative claims (78.4% vs 71.2% pass@1; 34/80 vs 21/80 GitHub issue resolution) that cannot be verified against tables or figures within the excerpt; checking evidence-claim alignment is materially demanded.
rationale.R1.4: RSP — 'generate, critique, and revise an explicit list of subgoals' — overlaps substantially with the self-refinement, scratchpad, and chain-of-thought decomposition literature; the novelty delta relative to nearest prior work requires assessment.
rationale.R1.5: The narrative arc is structurally unusual: DialogueDev is foregrounded in the opening and evaluation setup, yet RSP is declared the central contribution only late in the section; whether this ordering undermines or serves the paper's argument is a reviewable structural question.

parsed.clarification_question: Is the intended review primarily a technical content review — evaluating the validity of claims, internal logic, evidence support, and novelty — or primarily a writing and presentation review focused on improving prose clarity, flow, and sentence quality?
